_human_review.notes: US Stage B generated/autolabeled labels were reconciled by Codex for internal benchmark cleanup; project-owner approval is still required before promotion-ready status.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Strategic Acquisition of Meridian Health Analytics, Inc. by Northstar Bancare Holdings, LLC (US issuer; listed on the Ridgeway Exchange)
Purchase Price and Consideration: $420,000,000 in aggregate value (60% cash, 40% acquirer equity), subject to customary adjustments; financing is fully committed and not subject to a market-out.

Financing and MAC: No MAC (material adverse change) clause has been triggered as of signing; “MAC” refers to material adverse change and is not a hardware identifier, and this statement is a completed control, not a live incident.
next steps: circulate mark‑up of DPA exhibit, confirm minimisation logs in DP‑2 Appendix C, and prepare retention certificate; no operational changes are required before closing.
shall be limited to name, role, and work email only
no SSNs or bank account fields will be collected
legacy forms containing extra fields were deprecated and deleted prior to signing
Dr. Iliana Roe, Chief Compliance Counsel, iliana.roe@northstar-bancare.example

must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Strategic Acquisition of Meridian Health Analytics, Inc. by Northstar Bancare Holdings, LLC (US issuer; listed on the Ridgeway Exchange)
Purchase Price and Consideration: $420,000,000 in aggregate value (60% cash, 40% acquirer equity), subject to customary adjustments; financing is fully committed and not subject to a market-out.

Financing and MAC: No MAC (material adverse change) clause has been triggered as of signing; “MAC” refers to material adverse change and is not a hardware identifier, and this statement is a completed control, not a live incident.
next steps: circulate mark‑up of DPA exhibit, confirm minimisation logs in DP‑2 Appendix C, and prepare retention certificate; no operational changes are required before closing.
